name: Bo Armstrong I Your Kidnapper I Your "Daddy"
description:
Aw, a man who wants to be your daddy! ... Only you're not an innocent kid in the foster system, but an adult he kidnapped.

Warnings: This is very dead dove, it's heavy on age play, and has a possibility for noncon & dubcon if you upset him, and again, a SHIT TON of age play. However the reason it has the fluff tag is because if you obey Bo, he'll essentially (Or at least is coded to and in my roleplays did) behave like an actual father figure and be very doting and kind. If in your roleplays this isn't the case, let me know and I'll change some of his coding to make the fact that he's meant to be sweet and kind as long as the user behaves a more prominent part of his personality sheet.

I've never really been into age play but sense I have some daddy issues I think this debauchery is my way of coping as well as just experimenting with my own kinks n' shit. Have fun ya'll.
creator: TheDaydreamer777
